meta.title: Phook Theory — Balanced Wisdom · Modern Truth

hero.subtitle: The ego check you didn't know you needed — universal wisdom, breath practices, and tools to remove what blocks you.

about.label: What is Phook Theory
about.title: The breath that changes everything
about.body1: In many traditions across cultures, a healer's breath carries power to bless, cleanse, and restore. Phook Theory is built on that single ancient idea — one breath, released with intention, changes everything it touches.
about.pullQuote: Truth has breath. This is it.
about.body2: No toxic positivity. No fluff. Just honest breath — the kind that either lights your fire or lets the air out of your ego. Balanced wisdom for the modern mind.
about.lawBoxBody: The Phook Principles — a modern, accessible framework for universal energy truth.

teachings.label: Three Teaching Arms
teachings.title: The Phook Theory Framework
teachings.body: Every teaching under Phook Theory asks the same question: what are you holding that your breath could release? Three arms. One breath.

cards.label: Universal Laws
cards.title: Energy Flows Where Breath Goes
cards.desc: The Phook Principles — 7 universal energy laws. The Breath Laws — 6 daily practices. A modern, non-religious framework for understanding how your energy shapes your reality.

cards.label: Metaphysical
cards.title: The Crystal Phook Clearing — Tools to Remove What Blocks You
cards.desc: Crystals, space clearing, body energy work, ritual design. Physical and energetic tools for removing what stands between you and your clearest breath.

cards.label: Group & Collective
cards.title: Phook the Drama — Ego-Free Collective Energy and Group Flow
cards.desc: Workplace culture, team trust, group flow. Eight modules for any collective trying to function without the drama. The Balanced Office framework for efficient, ego-aware operations.

principles.label: Universal Laws
principles.title: The Phook Principles
principles.body: Seven laws. Accessible to all traditions, backgrounds, and beliefs. The universal truth that every wisdom culture has understood: your breath and attention shape your reality.

items.title: The Breath Law
items.text: Energy flows where breath goes. What you breathe into, you breathe life into. What you hold your breath from, you starve.

items.title: The Release Law
items.text: What you cannot release controls you. The phook — the exhale — is where your power lives. Not in the holding.

items.title: The Scatter Law
items.text: Truth, like dandelion seeds, multiplies when released. Wisdom hoarded decays. Wisdom shared grows.

items.title: The Return Law
items.text: What you release with intention returns transformed. Energy is never lost — it shifts form.

items.title: The Ego Check Law
items.text: The cleaner your breath, the cleaner your energy. Ego is compressed air. Phook it out.

items.title: The Watch Law
items.text: The eye at the centre sees all directions equally. Wisdom is not about looking forward — it is about seeing clearly from stillness.

items.title: The Balance Law
items.text: Long and short. Inhale and exhale. Work and rest. The alternating rhythm of all things in nature is the rhythm of a balanced life.

crystal.label: Metaphysical
crystal.title: The Crystal Phook Clearing
crystal.body: Tools to remove what blocks you. Crystals, space clearing, body energy work, and ritual design — practical anchors for intention.

items.name: Black Tourmaline
items.desc: Removes what blocks you. Grounds scattered energy. The primary phook crystal.

items.name: Clear Quartz
items.desc: Amplifies intention. Clarity after the clearing. Breath made visible.

items.name: Selenite
items.desc: Space and aura cleansing. Light in the dark corners.

items.name: Amethyst
items.desc: Calms ego. Supports wisdom over reaction. The watch stone.

items.name: Citrine
items.desc: Activates after the release. Abundance, joy, forward motion.

items.name: Lapis Lazuli
items.desc: Truth stone. Speaks what needs to be said. The Scatter Law in crystal form.

items.name: Rose Quartz
items.desc: Balances after the ego check. Self-compassion is part of the practice.

drama.label: Group & Collective
drama.title: Phook the Drama
drama.body: Ego-free collective energy and group flow. Eight modules for teams, workplaces, schools, and any group of humans trying to function together without the drama.

modules.title: The Ego Audit
modules.text: Understand your own ego role before trying to change others. Personal clarity first.

modules.title: The Breath Check
modules.text: Open every meeting with a collective breath practice. Sets the energetic tone for what follows.

modules.title: Trust Architecture
modules.text: How trust is built, broken, and rebuilt. Practical frameworks for psychological safety.

modules.title: The Drama Map
modules.text: Identify where drama lives in your group — roles, triggers, patterns. Name it without blame.

modules.title: Phook the Hierarchy
modules.text: Flattening ego-driven power structures. How to lead and follow with equal dignity.

modules.title: Collective Flow
modules.text: What group flow actually feels like and how to create the conditions for it consistently.

modules.title: The Balanced Office
modules.text: Practical systems: decision frameworks, conflict protocols, feedback culture, and team rhythm.

modules.title: The Group Phook
modules.text: A recurring team practice — the collective exhale. Regular intentional release of accumulated group tension.

app.label: The Phook Theory App
app.title: Your daily ego check
app.body: The Phook Theory app checks your energy daily — then either deflates the ego or elevates it, with wisdom and breath practices rooted in The Phook Principles.

features.text: Daily Ego Check Quiz — 'You Need a Phook' or 'Phook Yourself Up'
Phook It Journal — guided prompts from your daily score
Daily Phook — one truth delivered every morning
Crystal Phook Tracker — log your clearing practice

mockup.dailyText: "Stop waiting for permission. The breath is already yours."
